Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines the access levels and permissions within the application (e.g., Admin, Staff, Customer).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the permissions and responsibilities associated with this role.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account in the system, encompassing both internal staff/admin and external customers, linking to their assigned role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, typically used for authentication and contact.

phoneNumber.description: An optional contact phone number for the user.

roleId.description: Reference to the Role assigned to this user. (Relationship: Role 1:N UserProfile)

shippingAddress.description: The primary shipping address for the user, relevant for customer roles.

billingAddress.description: The primary billing address for the user, relevant for customer roles.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product available for sale in the shop, including its details and inventory information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The current selling price of the product.

stockQuantity.description: The current quantity of the product available in stock.

category.description: The category or type of the product (e.g., 'Electronics', 'Apparel').

imageUrl.description: URL to the main image of the product.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for the product inventory.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was first added.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's purchase, containing general order information and linking to specific order items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile (customer) who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processing', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

shippingAddress.description: The address where the order is to be shipped.

billingAddress.description: The address used for billing the order.

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the order (e.g., 'Paid', 'Pending', 'Refunded').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single item within an order, detailing the product, quantity, and price at the time of purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in this order item.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product at the time it was added to the order. This ensures historical price accuracy.

subtotal.description: The calculated subtotal for this order item (quantity * priceAtPurchase).

definition.description: Stores the definition of various roles. Read-only for all users.
Stores the active role assigned to each user. For prototyping, users can update their own role document to switch views.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores detailed profile information. Users manage their own; staff/admin can manage all.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Publicly readable catalog; managed by staff/admin.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for a product.

definition.description: Customer orders. Users see their own; staff/admin see all.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for an order.

definition.description: Items within an order. Authorization follows parent order ownership.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for an item.
